title: Java Developer
description: We are seeking a skilled Java Developer to join our engineering team. You will design, develop, and maintain high-quality Java applications that power our core business systems. This role offers the opportunity to work on challenging problems at scale while collaborating with talented engineers.

mustHave: Spring Framework (Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Data)

responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain robust Java applications using modern frameworks and best practices
Write clean, testable, and well-documented code following SOLID principles
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and implement new features
Participate in code reviews and contribute to improving development standards
Troubleshoot and debug production issues, performing root cause analysis
Optimize application performance and ensure scalability
Contribute to architectural decisions and technical documentation
Mentor junior developers and share knowledge with the team
interviewProcess: 30min culture fit conversation with hiring manager
